name: PFS Bancorp, Inc.
business: PFS Bancorp, Inc. is a savings and loan holding company that operates through its wholly owned subsidiary, Peru Federal Savings Bank, a federally-chartered savings bank. The company's business consists primarily of accepting deposits from the general public and investing those deposits in one- to four-family residential mortgage loans secured by properties in its primary market area, as well as commercial real estate, agricultural, construction, commercial, home equity, and consumer loans to a lesser extent.
sellsTo: Individuals and businesses in LaSalle County, Illinois, and contiguous areas of adjacent Bureau County and Putnam County, within a 30- to 35-mile radius from its offices

exposures.sentence: Our loan portfolio consists primarily of one-to four-family residential mortgage loans.
commercial real estate loans totaled $26.7 million, or 24.3% of total loans, of which $1.6 million was secured by agricultural properties.
commercial real estate loans totaled $26.7 million, or 24.3% of total loans
